title.en: Applying Spec Driven Development - Financial dashboard
title.es: Aplicando desarrollo guiado por especificaciones - Dashboard financiero

description.en: Spec-first frontend assignment: TypeScript API/param types, component breakdown in components.md, and data-contract README for three dashboard features—aligned with live OpenAPI at /docs. No React implementation.
description.es: Tarea frontend spec-first: tipos TypeScript de API/parámetros, desglose de componentes en components.md y README de contrato de datos para tres funcionalidades del dashboard—alineado con OpenAPI en /docs. Sin implementación React.

sharing.en: I just completed the Applying Spec Driven Development - Financial dashboard with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: TypeScript types from /docs, component specs, and data contracts for three dashboard features. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-specs-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #TypeScript #Specs
sharing.es: Acabo de completar el Applying Spec Driven Development - Financial dashboard con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: tipos TypeScript desde /docs, especificación de componentes y contratos de datos para tres funcionalidades del dashboard. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-specs-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #TypeScript #Especificaciones

sharing.en: Spec before build: financial dashboard features documented for devs and AI agents with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-specs-project #AIEngineering #Documentation #4GeeksAcademy
